description: Create a custom Bridge Command world named 'MeasuredMile' designed for calibrating ship speed logs. The world must be located at /opt/bridgecommand/World/MeasuredMile/ and include 1024x1024 pixel terrain assets: height.png (solid black/RGB 0,0,0) and texture.png (solid blue/RGB 0,0,128). Required configuration files in the world directory include description.ini, terrain.ini (mapping the terrain assets), and world.ini (start position ~50.15, -1.33). Define a North-South Measured Mile course in buoy.ini using four "Tower" markers at South Gate Latitude 50.166667, North Gate Latitude 50.183333, West Longitude -1.336667, and East Longitude -1.333333. Additionally, establish a test scenario in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/m) Measured Mile Trial/ containing environment.ini (Setting="MeasuredMile", StartTime=12.0) and ownship.ini with a vessel positioned south of the start gate heading North.
